startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Product detail URLs (for product_only / product_and_seller) or seller/store URLs (for seller_only).

mode.title: Crawl mode
mode.description: What to capture: 'product_only' scrapes the product; 'product_and_seller' scrapes the product and its seller; 'seller_only' scrapes only the seller from a seller/store URL.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of requests that can be made by this crawler.
